title: Ensure Iterator.next() throws NoSuchElementException
description: The java.util.Iterator.next() method must throw a NoSuchElementException when there are no more elements in the iteration. Any other behavior is non-compliant with the API contract and may cause unexpected behavior for users.
recommendation: Throw NoSuchElementException when there are no more elements in the iteration.
impact: Ensures compliance with the Iterator API contract and prevents unexpected behavior.

checks.message: Throw NoSuchElementException when there are no more elements in the iteration.
